content:
Hello! I’m 拉娅妮丝, you can call me flarin here.

I’m a Chinese native speaker and English is my second language. I also know some Japanese.

I am a big fan of this game and Cthulhu Mythos. I find the lore and plot in this game really fascinating, and I always hope to introduce the beauty of this game to EN players.

I will be mainly working on English translations and some proofreading. Currently I’m sparing some time to improve my translation skills, and I’ll try my best to provide high-quality  texts.

Glad to be here and I’m Iooking forward to working with you all!
